HEXAGHOST-BOLSTERING_GHOSTFLAME.title: Bolstering Ghostflame
HEXAGHOST-CRUSHING_GHOSTFLAME.title: Crushing Ghostflame
HEXAGHOST-CRUSHING_GHOSTFLAME.descriptio:
[gold]Ignite Condition[/gold]: Play [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Skills[/gold].
[gold]Effect[/gold]: Deal [blue]3[/blue] damage to a random enemy twice.
HEXAGHOST-INFERNO_GHOSTFLAME.title: Inferno Ghostflame
HEXAGHOST-INFERNO_GHOSTFLAME.description:
[gold]Ignite Condition[/gold]: Spend [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Energy[/gold].
[gold]Effect[/gold]: Deal [blue]4[/blue] damage to a random enemy for each Ignited Ghostflame.
If all Ghostflames are [gold]Ignited[/gold], gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Intensity[/gold].
Extinguish other Ghostflames.
HEXAGHOST-SEARING_GHOSTFLAME.title: Searing Ghostflame
HEXAGHOST-SEARING_GHOSTFLAME.description:
[gold]Ignite Condition[/gold]: Play [blue]2[/blue] Attacks.
[gold]Effect[/gold]: Apply [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Soulburn[/gold] to a random enemy twice.
